0.phonetic: /ɔːl aɪ ˈevər ˈwɑːntɪd wəz fɔːr ˈdʒuːli ˈbeɪkər tu liːv mi əˈloʊn/

keyPoints.explanation: 常用主语结构，指我长久以来唯一的心愿；例句：All I ever wanted was a simple life.（我一直以来唯一想要的就是简单的生活）

keyPoints.expression: was for sb to do sth
keyPoints.explanation: 用于表达内心期盼，愿望是让某人做某事；例句：My hope was for him to tell me the truth.（我的期盼是他能对我说实话）
口语固定短语，不要打扰某人、别缠着某人；例句：Please leave me alone when I study.（我学习的时候请别打扰我）

alts.verb: The only wish I had was that Juli Baker wouldn’t bother me.
alts.meaning: 我唯一的心愿就是朱莉·贝克不要来打扰我

alts.verb: I just hoped Juli Baker would keep away from me.
alts.meaning: 我只希望朱莉·贝克离我远一些

0.context: All I ever wanted was for my little brother to leave me alone while I read books. 看书的时候，我唯一的心愿就是弟弟别来烦我。

1.cn: 一切都要从1957年二年级开学前的那个夏天说起。
1.en: It all began in the summer of 1957 right before second grade started.

alts.verb: Everything started the summer of 1957 ahead of the second grade.
alts.meaning: 所有事情都发生在1957年二年级开学前的夏天。

alts.verb: The whole story took place in the summer of 1957 prior to second grade.
alts.meaning: 整件事发生在1957年二年级之前的夏天。

1.phonetic: /ɪt ɔːl bɪˈɡæn ɪn ðə ˈsʌmər əv ˈnaɪnˈfɪftiˈsevn raɪt bɪˈfɔːr ˈsekənd ɡreɪd ˈstɑːrtɪd/

keyPoints.explanation: 叙事开篇固定句式，意为一切始于……，常用于回忆往事；例句：It all began on a rainy winter morning.（一切都始于一个下雨的冬日清晨。）
副词短语，就在……之前，加强时间紧迫感；例句：I arrived right before the class began.（我刚好在上课前赶到。）

1.context: It all began in the summer of 2024 right before my senior year started. 一切都始于2024年高三开学前的那个夏天。

2.en: before the start of second grade.

examples: Prior to the commencement of second grade.
Just before I started second grade.
